monitor.name: Northwind Uptime Observatory
monitor.downtime_rule: A minute is recorded as down when the health probe fails from a majority of probe regions within that minute.

data_gaps.reason: Probe fleet migration. Telemetry for this interval was not retained and cannot be reconstructed.
Collector outage at the monitoring provider; no data was written.

measurement.measurement_note: Downtime is reported only for intervals that were actually observed. Because 17131 minutes of the service period were never sampled, no period uptime percentage can be derived from this report and none is published. The absence of recorded downtime inside a gap is not evidence of availability.

incidents.summary: Service unavailable from all probe regions.
Elevated error rate exceeding the failure threshold.

notes: This report does not establish measured uptime for the service period. It is published in incomplete form so the gap is visible rather than silently filled.
